Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS CHARLES ENGELBERG, BECKY ENGELBERG Amended Notice of Motion to Tax Costs. Appearances: Ellen Tsang Defendant appearing in Pro Per (415) 205-7312. Defendant is appearing to have order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted in part and denied in part. Motion granted as to $225 for "service of process" for papers to be served on plaintiffs "as soon as possible." Plaintiff meets burden to show costs unreasonable and unnecessary when papers can be served by mail. Motion denied in all other respects. Exhibit photo copies and Bar Association of San Francisco fee allowed under CCP section 1033.5(c)(4) in court's discretion in view of timing of dismissal. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Further Respond To Deft
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Henry Glasser, Esq. (415-434-2050), appearing for defendant / moving party Ellen Tsang Trustee of Arza Trust
Terence O. Mayo, Esq. of MAYO & MAYO (415-397-1515), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Charles Engelberg

RULING:
Defendant's motion to compel further responses to discovery and for sanctions. Matter was argued and the Court ordered plaintiff's deposition to be completed before December 18, 2009. Defendant's notice of summary judgment motion is reduced to a 45-day notice. Defendant's motion to compel responses denied as to Form Interrogatories #2.2 and 2.7 and granted as to all other requests. Prevailing party is to prepare an order for the Court's signature. Judge: CURTIS KARNOW, MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories, (Set One), Special Interrogoatories (Set One), Req. For Admissions (Set One), And Req. For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ellen Tsang, defendant and moving party, in Propria Persona
Mary Beth Mayo, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Charles Engelberg

After hearing, Defendant Ellen Tsang's Motion to compel plaintiffs Charles Engelberg and Becky Engelberg further responses to defendant's form interrogatories (set one); special interrogatories (et one); request for admissions (set one); and request for production of documents (set one); and for monetary sanctions is Denied. Motion not timely filed; court lacks jurisdiction to consider motion. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf To Obey The Court'S Order Of Aug 12, 2009 And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ellen Tsang, defendant and moving party in Pro Per
Terence O. Mayo, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Charles Engelberg

After hearing, Defendant Ellen Tsang's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Obey The Court's Order Of August 12, 2009 And For Sanctions is granted in part. Plaintiff shall serve original verification by Charles Engleberg (as to responses to request for production) on or before October 9, 2009. Request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Motion To Compel Pltf Charles Engelberg And Becky Engelberg To Respond To Discovery Requests And Request For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ellen Tsang, defendant and moving party in Propria Persona
Terence Mayo, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Charles Engelberg

After hearing, Defendant Ellen Tsang's Motion to compel plaintiffs to respond to discovery requests; and request for sanctions: Granted.
Plaintiff to provide original verifications and copy of document product by 8/24/09, by method of delivering that can be tracked. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
